rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that pointsFunctor_obj and pointsFunctor_map lack @[simp], which is a real deficiency: without it, simp cannot reduce (pointsFunctor H).obj A or .map φ to their concrete forms, hurting downstream automation — both lemmas are confirmed rfl in the diff. The redundant mapPoints_one/mul/inv removal is more debatable but is also grounded in the diff. Review 1 approves without catching these genuine omissions.
